## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Augment's marketing strategy and GrowthX's role in content creation and distribution.](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Augment is shifting focus to enterprise sales-led growth, aiming to double sales-led revenue in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=5749.0)
  - [Content strategy needs to target both individual developers and decision-makers at 50+ engineer companies](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
  - [GrowthX to align content with Augment's new ICP, focusing on awareness and PQA generation for sales team](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

## Topics

### Augment's Market Positioning

  - [Differentiator: "Context Engine" - superior code retrieval and indexing for large codebases](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [Outperforms competitors (e.g. Cursor) on complex tasks and large projects](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [Target: Companies with 50+ engineers where Augment's advantages are most apparent](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Categorize content by audience: individual developers vs. decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=2364.0)
  - [Align with sales team needs: create content usable for outbound efforts](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
  - [Expand content types: listicles, how-tos, use cases, webinars, event content](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=4986.0)
  - [Repurpose newsletter content as blog posts for wider reach](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=5278.0)

### Marketing Channels

  - [Reddit: Shift from paid ads to organic engagement; create value-add content (e.g. prompt templates)](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=3493.0)
  - [YouTube: Potential channel based on customer feedback (EVPs consuming AI coding content)](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=3861.0)
  - [Events/Webinars: Increase frequency to generate leads and content for outbound efforts](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=3120.0)

### Metrics and Goals

  - [Shift from self-serve to sales-led revenue focus](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=5749.0)
  - [Key metrics: PQAs, meetings booked, new trials from enriched users](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=6177.0)
  - [Attribution: Implement multi-touch attribution to measure content impact](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=4781.0)

### GrowthX's Role

  - [Focus on awareness and PQA generation through content](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=3104.0)
  - [Align content creation with Augment's new ICP and messaging](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
  - [Support sales team with content for outbound efforts](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
  - [Experiment with new channels (e.g. Reddit, YouTube) based on Augment's guidance](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=3493.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Augment to provide access to sales call recordings and Octave for ICP insights](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=2978.0)
  - [GrowthX to revise content strategy based on new focus and ICP](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=4230.0)
  - [Implement attribution tracking to measure content performance](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=4781.0)
  - [Explore newsletter optimization and lifecycle marketing opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=5080.0)
  - [Augment to share OKRs and specific goals for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/j8Fi8q6_39EN-cTLG2f4L7raeCexouPc?tab=summary&timestamp=4230.0)
